candidates.bounded_summary: Candidate remains visible with no feedback aggregate authority.
Pin and useful feedback elevate display hint without promotion.
Dismiss feedback lowers display hint without deletion.
Correction feedback creates review warning only.
Invalidation and wrong feedback require review without deletion or parser mutation.
Needs-more-evidence feedback creates a review cue only.
Scope-overreach feedback creates a rule review cue only.
Not-relevant-now feedback creates a stale context cue only.
